name: Shrimp Seviche Cocktail
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound shrimp, shelled, deveined and cut into small bite sized pieces
1 Tablespoon freshly toasted and ground black peppercorns
1/2 Tablespoon freshly toasted and ground coriander seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a non-reactive bowl or dish.
2. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
3. Drain off the liquids and discard them.
4. Serve the shrimp in chilled martini glasses.
Note: Garnishes could include minced red onions, fresh herbs, diced raw tomato or a fresh raw fruit like mandarin oranges.
